title: polygala oxyptera var. ciliata
intro: Polygala oxyptera var. ciliata, also known as Chinese Polygala, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala oxyptera var. ciliata is often prepared as a decoction or made into capsules for medicinal purposes, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
